properties.displayName: Deploy PostgreSQL database flexible server parameter log_checkpoints ON
properties.description: Enabling log_checkpoints helps the PostgreSQL Database to Log each checkpoint in turn generates query and error logs. However, access to transaction logs is not supported. Query and error logs can be used to identify, troubleshoot, and repair configuration errors and sub-optimal performance.
nonComplianceMessages: PostgreSQL database flexible server configuration does not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: PostgreSQL parameter log_checkpoints must be enabled. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
